sampleTweets.text:
SOL is officially a digital commodity. While the headlines were catching up to reality, RWA value hit an all-time high, stablecoin supply crossed $17B, and the builder pipeline keeps getting deeper.

Here’s what happened over the week:

📰 Headline News

- @SECGov formally classified SOL as a digital commodity in its new crypto asset taxonomy

- Solana's RWA Value hit an ATH of ~$1.85B

- @OndoFinance expanded Ondo Global Markets to 250+ tokenized stocks, ETFs and commodities

- SIMD-0266 (P-Token) went live on testnet

📰 Launches

- @tokens launched. Find 24/7 breaking news, how it moves global financial markets, and where those markets live on Solana 

- @altitude unlocked bank transfers, allowing direct bank payments worldwide from Altitude accounts

- West Coast Stock Transfer adopted @alpha_ledger's Vulcan Forge to tokenize @SiloPharma securities on Solana

- @hinkal_protocol released its privacy wallet on Solana

- @GustoHQ integrated USDC on Solana payouts for same-day international contractors payments

- @kamino announced a pilot integrating its Atlas Collateral Management with @Anchorage for institutional credit

@Paradex's DIME debuted on Solana via @Sunrise_DeFi

- @PlayBabylon unveiled its multiplayer prediction game where humans and AI agents compete

- @MessariCrypto added Solana support for x402 payments across its API endpoints

- @GoDark opened early access to its decentralized dark pool DEX for private trading

- @DeriveXYZ shipped SOL options on its platform

- @colosseum crowned the winners of the Agent Hackathon

- @SuperteamDE to host Solana Summit Germany in Berlin on June 13

- @solana_devs kicked off the Solana Japan Developer Bootcamp

- @SP3NDdotshop facilitated eBay purchases with USDC on Solana

- @sanafionchain presented Sana Card, a self-custody Visa card issued by @raincards

- @Alchemy enabled Solana agents to pay for its APIs with USDC via @x402

- @bigdance_fun rolled out an onchain tokenized bracket game tied to tournament outcomes

- @solanamobile launched Builder Grants

- @glamsystems introduced Token ACL, enabling compliance with composability

- @CyreneAI launched Genesis Accelerator offering Solana builders up to $100K in seed capital

- @travalacom expanded its car rental bookings to include Solana support

- @ScorelyGG debuted a sports betting platform with up to 10x leverage on odds

- @fairscalexyz shipped FairScale L3Ns as a Chrome extension, displaying any Solana wallet's reputation score

- @yield launched yoSOL algorithmically optimized vault

📰 Milestones

- @bulktrade recorded 110K wallets, 45K traders, and 330K trades by Day 3 of its testnet

- Solana stablecoin supply reached $17B

- @humafinance surpassed $11B in total PayFi transaction volume

- @solflare crosses $3M Private Send

If you enjoyed this week’s newsletter, please share it with an RT.

reason: Perps / Trading cluster linked by [trading, long, token, perps, backpack]

sampleTweets.text:
Quick overview of $BP airdrop

Pre-market dumping to $260M FDV

MadLad holders got 1k tokens worth $260 at current price

And it's for OG NFT project of Solana

The airdrop basically covered fees you burned trading perps that's it

There no life-changing money

Low FDV is good for long-term price potential, but it makes the airdrop itself small

Staking utility:

- Up to +3% yield boost on USD
- Down to 0% maker fees
- Zero wire fees on deposits and withdrawals below $500K/30D
- Buy Backpack equity with tokens

First 7 days unstake anytime

After that 7-day unstake window

What are your thoughts? Let's discuss👇

- No insiders
- No VCs
- No team tokens

Just users

Backpack TGE is tomorrow 🎒

Stake or dump? Let's find out:

1️⃣ Tokenomics

- 25% at TGE (24% points + 1% Mad Lads)
- 37.5% pre-IPO (unlocked by achievements)
- 37.5% post-IPO (fully locked until 1 year post-IPO)

The community will be the only one holding tokens for the first weeks, and new tokens only get "minted" when certain milestones are achieved.

What those milestones look like is unknown so far.

The whole idea is similar to MetaDAO's idea of unlocking team tokens at certain FDV thresholds — but still very different.

Pre-IPO tokens don't all go to the team, and it's more important for Backpack to meet company KPIs than to hit a certain FDV.

Team allocation goes to the "Corporate Treasury," locked until at least one year post-IPO. The team owns equity in the company, and the company owns a large share of the token supply.

2️⃣ TGE and Airdrop

As mentioned, the community will own 100% of the circulating supply.
Prediction markets currently suggest an FDV of $300M, which would imply an airdrop worth $75M and 1 point = $0.20.

1 Backpack point ≈ $0.20
1 Mad Lad ≈ $350*

*I doubt everyone will get the same allocation for Mad Lads tho.

Armani has always talked about rewarding loyalty — see a proposed model below.

Overall, short-term price action shouldn't be overvalued, especially in a bear market and with a project like Backpack. This could take months or years to reach the price it deserves.

3️⃣ IPO Model

While other exchanges like Binance, Crypto. com, and KuCoin mostly did ICOs or private sales with less than 15% initial supply, Backpack is going dual: token and IPO.

A dual model means profits are somehow split between token holders and equity holders.

That usually ends with either two weak assets — or one strong and one down bad.

Guess which one is normally down bad...

There's a risk we get a token that the team and investors don't actually want to hold.

And IPOs take years.

The upside? The token will likely trade at a premium pre-IPO.

A dual system (token + equity) has never worked before.
But honestly if anyone can pull it off, it's Backpack.

4️⃣ Numbers and future

- $400B+ cumulative trading volume

- $100M+ annual revenue in 2025

- $1B pre-money valuation (unicorn status)

- 150+ countries served

Future plans include:

- Tokenized stock trading (real ownership rights)
- Physical cards
- Checking and savings accounts
- Real-world assets (gold, oil, commodities)

5️⃣ Stake or dump?

Backpack announced that 20% of their equity will go to users who stake for 1 year — something no one has done before.

This gives the community a real chance to own a piece of the company. (Love this.)

But this market is tough, and I know a lot of farmers who've been waiting on this airdrop for months trying to offset losses. People need liquidity.

The price action isn't in Armani's hands, but I'm sure $BP will find its fair price over the years.

If you need the money — dump it. The price could definitely go lower.

If you don't, and you believe in Backpack's vision join the experiment and forget about what you staked. There's a solid chance you get rewarded in a few years.

Overall, you can complain that the whole seasons thingy went on way too long but Backpack is one of the teams in crypto with the highest moral compass. They tried to do things the right way, without creating unnecessary risk for themselves, the platform, or the community.

Ive watched the entire interview and, first of all, huge congrats to @TakayamaJoe for this incredible work! 

Here is an extended summary:

> What @Backpack is trying with $BP is something new, for the first time in crypto history, by owning a token, you will be able to own a portion of the company itself. Just imagine if BNB gave you a portion of Binance equity...

> 62.5% of $BP supply is for the community, and it will act as a fuel to increase the growth and create a broader community.

> Expect new "seasons" or "campaigns" for new regions like Japan or USA when Backpack arrives. This will be the fuel to attract more users and build a bigger community.

> Three big products that will come out over the next ~2 months: prediction markets, stocks and another one which is a secret for now. 

> New prediction market will be a completely new product, not just a different UI for Kalshi or Poly. You will be able to use the same liquidity for Spot, perps and prediction markets. Deposit your $BTC, borrow USD against it and use them for your predictions! Expect this shortly after TGE (few days only). More things coming but @armaniferrante doesnt want to spoil everything 👀

> Backpack will have their setting up their own traditional stock dealer to trade real stocks in the same way you trade them in Robinhood. Why real stocks? Because it makes you a real shareholder with security entitlement, legal protection, etc... You will be able to buy real shares from any company. Of course, you need to do KYC for all of this (security matters). You will be able to use your spot stocks also as collateral for your crypto spot, perps and prediction markets.

> Equity perps are coming right after spot stocks are available.

> Armani shows big respect to the projects that have brought xStocks and perp trading for stocks, but Backpack wants to try something different. Both products are respectable.

> What it really means to have Mark Wetjen as President of Backpack US: Mark has decades of experience and, if you want to become the globally regulated financial institution for the future of money, you just need top tier people like Mark.

> Japan is a sleeping giant, dont understimate this region and thats why its crucial to onboard them to Backpack. Most of US exchanges are not allowed to operate in Japan. There is an incredible amount of volume in DEXs that comes from Japan users.

> Dont understimate Europe either, which is a huge territory in terms of volume. Most of derivatives and perpetual trading are not allowed in Europe, and Backpack is close to get the MiCA license after three years of work.

Message to Backpack users from @armaniferrante: what rises fast, falls very fast. Backpack is a very long term project, and we are very happy to do things slow and steady way, BRICK BY BRICK. If you look at the product and understand the convergion between crypto and traditional finance, you will also understand why we are working like we do. We will be building for over a decade or even an entire lifetime. There is no shortcuts. Forget about single cycles and think about multiyear time horizon, this will free you up to make decisions.

Thanks to both @armaniferrante and @TakayamaJoe for this amazing interview!

Someone minted ~80M $USR using only $200K USDC

Being a healthy, normal human is penalized by X.

If you spend time outside, grounded, enjoying real life and actually touching grass, you become less relevant on the app because of the algorithm.

If you spend 8 hours a day consuming content, replying, tweeting, and answering dms, you get rewarded with engagement and fame.

That engagement pulls you in deeper, increasing your dependency and usage. You strengthen your dopamine addiction.

The more you use X, the worse you feel. You become easier to influence, easier to control.

You start giving away your energy and attention (consciously or not) to something or someone else.

Meanwhile, the most unhappy and mentally unstable people are often the ones rewarded with the most attention, which others mistake for credibility.

So you end up with the most unstable voices leading the conversation and others listening, creating an echo chamber of dysfunction.

The most viral tweets are often the most damaging, because their validity is manufactured by an algorithm that rewards disconnection from real life, from meaning, from yourself.

Information that comes from ignorance and disconnection will almost always lead to empty, unproductive outcomes.
